/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/OpenGLTest.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLTest.dir/src/glad.c.o -o OpenGLTest  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo
